message:
chore(gitignore): Add patterns for NTM and compiled binaries

Adds ignore patterns for:
- .ntm/ directory used by NTM agent coordination
- a.out compiled binary files

These are runtime artifacts that should not be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -243,3 +243,9 @@ storage/unified_agent_memory.db-journal
 storage/exercise_mental_health_quiz.html
 storage/exercise_mental_health_report.md
 storage/unified_agent_memory.dbOLD
+
+# NTM agent coordination
+.ntm/
+
+# Compiled binaries
+a.out
